title: Sorting Algorithm Orchestration
description: An audio-visual sorting algorithm laboratory with async/await step-by-step execution, Web Audio API sonification, canvas bar rendering with state-based color coding, and real-time telemetry across 4 algorithms.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Four sorting algorithms: Bubble Sort (O(n²)), Insertion Sort (O(n²)), Quick Sort (O(n log n) with Hoare partition scheme), Selection Sort (O(n²)) — all implemented as async generators
Async step throttle: custom delay() returning Promise with setTimeout(ms = 100 - speed) inside while loops, yielding to event loop for live rendering without thread lock
Web Audio sonification: per-comparison OscillatorNode (sine/triangle/sawtooth) with frequency = 200 + (val/maxVal) × 800 Hz, exponentialRampToValueAtTime 0.08s decay envelope
Color-coded bar states: default=#6a5acd violet, scanning pointer=#ff2a5f magenta, evaluating pair=#00f0ff cyan, sorted=#00ff66 emerald — reset per frame draw cycle
Telemetry panel: live comparisons counter, swaps counter, elapsed time (computed on sort completion via Date.now), algorithm complexity label
Abort-safe stop: abort boolean flag checked at every loop iteration, instant kill + re-seed via stopReset() without page reload
Size/speed sliders: array size 15-150 triggers fresh array, speed 1-100 maps to delay ms = max(1, 100 - speed) for real-time pacing
Canvas resize: buffer re-mapped to CSS bounding rect, generateArray() re-scales values proportional to new height
